Product Title: Title of your product as on Flipkart.com
Processing errors (if any): Any errors in uploading the file will come here
Inactive Reason: Reason if Flipkart has made your product Inactive
Bank Settlement: Bank Settlement is your product cost + margin. System will calculate listing price as: Bank Settlement + Fees & Taxes
Benchmark Price: Benchmark Price is a system-generated price using market trends, competitive & listing prices. It is updated periodically to reflect latest details.
System Stock count: Current stock count for your product
Your Stock Count:
Quantity of item you wish to sell
Note: The maximum stock quantity you can update is 5000 units per location. For MinOQ listings, the limit is 5000 × MinOQ per location.
Recommended Stock: This is the product stock value recommended for you to avoid missing out on sales.
Procurement SLA: Time taken to keep the order ready for pick up; Allowed values: 1 or 2 Days for Instock, 1 or 2 hours for Express
Procurement Type: Way of procuring the item after getting an order
Local Delivery Charge to Customer (per q: Shipping charge to customer for local orders
Zonal Delivery Charge to Customer (per q: Shipping charge to customer for zonal orders
National Delivery Charge to Customer (pe: Shipping charge to customer for national orders
Harmonized System Nomenclature - HSN: Applicable HSN code for the product
Tax Code: Applicable tax slab for the product
Country of Origin ISO code: Place of origination of the product
Manufacturer Details: Details of the manufacturer(s) of the product
Importer Details: Detail of the importer(s) of the product
Packer Details: Detail of the packer(s) of the product
Ignore warnings: If the price or lbhw entered by you is correct, then please select YES and RE_UPLOAD the file
Listing Archival: Allows you archive a listing in case you don’t wish to sell it
